lessons.title: Introduction to Influence & Reciprocity 🎁
lessons.description: The science of compliance. Why a free gift creates an unspoken debt.

lessons.title: Scarcity: The Fear of Missing Out ⏳
lessons.description: Creating urgency. Why 'limited time offers' bypass logical thinking.

lessons.title: Authority: The Power of the Uniform 👔
lessons.description: Why we obey titles, suits, and clipboards without question.

lessons.title: Consistency & Commitment 📝
lessons.description: The foot-in-the-door technique. Small 'yes' leads to big 'yes'.

lessons.title: Liking: The Friendship Formula 😊
lessons.description: Similarity, compliments, and rapport. Making the target want to help you.

lessons.title: Social Proof: The Bandwagon Effect 👥
lessons.description: If everyone else is doing it, it must be safe. Leveraging herd mentality.
